Fem!Pov(obviously) | Childhood Friends | Friends to.. ?
----
He hadn't called or written much after the wedding. Maybe he'd just been having such a good time with his wife? Apparently not...Because here he is back home. Your mutual friend's birthday party was the last place you expected to see him since he moved. And he's not wearing his ring...
